title: Arrow Rider
description: Shot an arrow and ride on it thanks to an enchantment
body:
# Arrow Rider Mod
Old Version was completely rewritten. Mod will be ported to Forge and Neoforge too, but currently only Fabric for the newest Versions. 

## How does it work?
The enchantment is very cheap to get on your Bow, and can be combined with Mending or Infinity.
Just shoot your Arrows and it will happen. You can obviously dismount the Arrow at any time and it should automatically dismount you when the arrow hits a block.

## Position
The Enchantment book should be available at loot chests, villages and all places where books are available :=)
